_comment: Reference MCP configuration for the Azure Networking content developer workspace. Replace ${env:...} variables with your own values via environment variables or a .env file.

content-developer-assistant._path_comment: macOS/Linux: Point to your local clone of content-developer-mcp, e.g. /Users/<you>/github/content-developer-mcp/scripts/mcp-proxy-wrapper.js

content-developer-assistant-win._path_comment: Windows: Point to your local clone of content-developer-mcp, e.g. C:\github\content-developer-mcp\mcp-server\build\index.js
